{%- set cn = (doc.container_no or '')|upper -%} {%- set prefix = cn[:4] -%} {%- set number = cn[4:10] -%} {%- set cd = cn[10:11] -%} {%- set io_date = doc.eir_date or doc.gate_in_timestamp or doc.gate_out_timestamp or doc.creation -%} {%- set checklist = frappe.get_all('Inspection Checklist Item', filters={'is_active': 1}, fields=['item_code','printed_no','area','item_name','sequence'], order_by='sequence asc') -%} {%- set damage_codes = frappe.get_all('Inspection Damage Code', filters={'is_active': 1}, fields=['name','description'], order_by='name asc') -%} {%- set repair_codes = frappe.get_all('Inspection Repair Code', filters={'is_active': 1}, fields=['name','description'], order_by='name asc') -%} {%- set dmap = {} -%} {%- for d in doc.damage_log -%}{%- if d.checklist_item -%}{%- set _ = dmap.update({d.checklist_item: d}) -%}{%- endif -%}{%- endfor -%} {%- set active_codes = checklist|map(attribute='item_code')|list -%} {%- set legacy = [] -%} {%- for d in doc.damage_log -%}{%- if d.checklist_item and d.checklist_item not in active_codes -%}{%- set _ = legacy.append(d) -%}{%- endif -%}{%- endfor -%} {%- set half = ((checklist|length) + 1) // 2 -%}
